name: Sharing a Room with the School Divas
description:
First page wtf 😭

You’re on a school trip… and to your horror, the hotel rooms are randomly assigned. Now you’re stuck in a room with the three hottest, meanest girls in school — and there are only two beds. None of them want to share with you. They’re arguing. You have to pick a side… or sleep on the floor.
